name: nasai
title: Sunan al-Nasa'i
author: Imam al-Nasa'i
description: Collection known for detailed chains of narration and strong authenticity standards.

books.name: The Book of Purification
books.description: Comprehensive rulings on Taharah, including all forms of ritual purity required for acts of worship.

books.name: The Book of Water
books.description: Rights and responsibilities regarding water sources and irrigation distribution.

books.name: The Book of Menstruation and Istihadah
books.description: Islamic jurisprudence regarding menstruation (Hayd) and postnatal bleeding, detailing their effect on worship.

books.name: The Book of Ghusl and Tayammum
books.description: Guidelines concerning the major ritual bath (Ghusl) and the circumstances requiring it.

books.name: The Book of Salah
books.description: A section containing authenticated traditions on this unique subject, compiled by the author.

books.name: The Book of the Times (of Prayer)
books.description: Detailed instructions on the times, methods, and spiritual dimensions of the five daily prayers (Salat).

books.name: The Book of the Adhan (The Call to Prayer)
books.description: Detailed instructions on the times, methods, and spiritual dimensions of the five daily prayers (Salat).

books.name: The Book of the Masjids
books.description: The virtues of mosques, the acts of worship performed within them, and guidelines for attendees.

books.name: The Book of the Qiblah
books.description: A section containing authenticated traditions on this unique subject, compiled by the author.

books.name: The Book of Leading the Prayer (Al-Imamah)
books.description: Detailed instructions on the times, methods, and spiritual dimensions of the five daily prayers (Salat).

books.name: The Book of the Commencement of the Prayer
books.description: Detailed instructions on the times, methods, and spiritual dimensions of the five daily prayers (Salat).

books.name: The Book of The At-Tatbiq (Clasping One's Hands Together)
books.description: A section containing authenticated traditions on this unique subject, compiled by the author.

books.name: The Book of Forgetfulness (In Prayer)
books.description: Detailed instructions on the times, methods, and spiritual dimensions of the five daily prayers (Salat).

books.name: The Book of Jumu'ah (Friday Prayer)
books.description: Detailed instructions on the times, methods, and spiritual dimensions of the five daily prayers (Salat).

books.name: The Book of Shortening the Prayer When Traveling
books.description: Detailed instructions on the times, methods, and spiritual dimensions of the five daily prayers (Salat).

books.name: The Book of Eclipses
books.description: Sunnah of the eclipse prayers (Salat al-Kusuf and Khusuf), recognizing natural phenomena as signs of Allah's power.

books.name: The Book of Praying for Rain (Al-Istisqa')
books.description: The prayer for seeking rain (Salat al-Istisqa) performed during times of drought.

books.name: The Book of the Fear Prayer
books.description: Detailed instructions on the times, methods, and spiritual dimensions of the five daily prayers (Salat).

books.name: The Book of the Prayer for the Two 'Eids
books.description: Detailed instructions on the times, methods, and spiritual dimensions of the five daily prayers (Salat).

books.name: The Book of Qiyam Al-Lail (The Night Prayer) and Voluntary Prayers During the Day
books.description: Detailed instructions on the times, methods, and spiritual dimensions of the five daily prayers (Salat).

books.name: The Book of Funerals
books.description: Instructions on washing, shrouding, praying over, and burying the deceased, as well as mourning etiquette.

books.name: The Book of Fasting
books.description: Regulations regarding obligatory fasting during Ramadan and voluntary fasts throughout the year.

books.name: The Book of Zakah
books.description: Comprehensive guide to the obligatory almsgiving (Zakat), detailing who must pay, allowable recipients, and calculable wealth types.

books.name: The Book of Hajj
books.description: Complete rites and spiritual significance of the major pilgrimage to Mecca (Hajj).

books.name: The Book of Jihad
books.description: The principles of struggle, rules of military engagement, treaties, and the high status of martyrs.

books.name: The Book of Marriage
books.description: Extensive teachings on the marital contract, domestic harmony, choosing a spouse, and spousal rights.

books.name: The Book of Divorce
books.description: The procedures, cooling-off periods (Iddah), and regulations surrounding marital dissolution (Talaq).

books.name: The Book of Horses, Races and Shooting
books.description: A section containing authenticated traditions on this unique subject, compiled by the author.

books.name: The Book of Endowments
books.description: Principles of establishing continuous charities or trusts (Waqf) for public or specialized benefit.

books.name: The Book of Wills
books.description: Instructions on bequeathing property through a final testament (Wasiyyah) within permitted Islamic limits.

books.name: The Book of Presents
books.description: A section containing authenticated traditions on this unique subject, compiled by the author.

books.name: The Book of Gifts
books.description: The etiquette and legal parameters of giving gifts, transferring wealth, and fostering goodwill.

books.name: The Book of ar-Ruqba
books.description: A section containing authenticated traditions on this unique subject, compiled by the author.

books.name: The Book of 'Umra
books.description: A section containing authenticated traditions on this unique subject, compiled by the author.

books.name: The Book of Oaths and Vows
books.description: Rulings on swearing oaths, fulfilling vows, and the expiation required when breaking them.

books.name: The Book of the Kind Treatment of Women
books.description: A section containing authenticated traditions on this unique subject, compiled by the author.

books.name: The Book of Fighting [The Prohibition of Bloodshed]
books.description: A section containing authenticated traditions on this unique subject, compiled by the author.

books.name: The Book of Distribution of Al-Fay'
books.description: A section containing authenticated traditions on this unique subject, compiled by the author.

books.name: The Book of al-Bay'ah
books.description: A section containing authenticated traditions on this unique subject, compiled by the author.

books.name: The Book of al-'Aqiqah
books.description: A section containing authenticated traditions on this unique subject, compiled by the author.

books.name: The Book of al-Fara' and al-'Atirah
books.description: A section containing authenticated traditions on this unique subject, compiled by the author.

books.name: The Book of Hunting and Slaughtering
books.description: Rules regarding lawful hunting practices, use of hunting animals, and slaughtering conditions.

books.name: The Book of ad-Dahaya (Sacrifices)
books.description: The Sunnah of ritual animal sacrifice during Eid al-Adha (Udhiyah) and child birth (Aqiqah).

books.name: The Book of Financial Transactions
books.description: A section containing authenticated traditions on this unique subject, compiled by the author.

books.name: The Book of Oaths (qasamah), Retaliation and Blood Money
books.description: Rulings on swearing oaths, fulfilling vows, and the expiation required when breaking them.

books.name: The Book of Cutting off the Hand of the Thief
books.description: A section containing authenticated traditions on this unique subject, compiled by the author.

books.name: The Book Of Faith and its Signs
books.description: Fundamental teachings on faith (Iman), its branches, and matters of belief in Allah, His Angels, Books, Messengers, and the Last Day.

books.name: The Book of Adornment
books.description: A section containing authenticated traditions on this unique subject, compiled by the author.

books.name: The Book of the Etiquette of Judges
books.description: A section containing authenticated traditions on this unique subject, compiled by the author.

books.name: The Book of Seeking Refuge with Allah
books.description: A section containing authenticated traditions on this unique subject, compiled by the author.

books.name: The Book of Drinks
books.description: Permitted beverages, prohibitions on intoxicants, and the Prophetic manners for drinking.
